description: Tanda has been a vast improvement for our business and has sped up our payroll processes, created better accountability and viasability. I am excited to see the platform improve.
author: Kassy T.
pros: The Awards team assisting me build the award rules the notifications for expired qualifications
cons: The reports function is not customisable. I don't have any use for the reports Tanda has but I do export the data in the system and build my own reports. I would like a leave liability by team or business area report. A longest hours worked report. I have been promise GPS time punches for a while now and am yet to see any progress made, this is an imperative function for my business. i would like the ability to edit the award interpretation before exporting. Currently i export to excel as our Payroll provider is not integrated. So i can manually change what i need to, but then Tanda is different to what was actually paid. I would like the ability to edit in in Tanda so that everything is current, correct and aligned.

description: I have used Tanda for like few months. I have used its attendance tracking and timesheet features. There are things to be improved, but still I can say it is a good tool for what we pay.
author: hasini W.
pros: I feel it is useful when it comes to record leaves and attendance. App reminded me about my schedules by sending me notifications and it saved my time.
cons: For me it was somewhat difficult to be familiar with Tanda in the first few weeks. So I had to get the help of my friends. I think user friendliness need to be improved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Customer support has been good and for what we pay, I cannot complain
author: Tanya C.
pros: I like the ease of having staff sign in with a code and being able to track time and use for payroll. Also like a place to keep staff files electronically with the warning on expiries.
cons: It often doesn't update staff sign in on the day. Sometimes yes, sometimes its not until the next day that it shows a staff signing in or out or at all for either. Its very slow to update. It was set on a two week pay period as I was told I have to pay for more the option of bi-monthly and I saw no value in this for one feature. I now have it without the pay increase after almost 2 years.

review_title: Make life easier using Tanda for all your HR and Payroll Accounting needs
description: 100% positive, recommended it to many individuals.
author: Peta D.
pros: Functional, very easy to use. For many of our staff English is a second language, they find the system very straight forward to onboard and utilise to log their unavailability and clock on and off.
cons: More indepth tailored hour costing reports would be great.

author: Kate W.
pros: The rostering platform is extremely easy to use. The ability to copy a roster over one week to the next is great and ensures consistency for our team and children (we are a childcare service). The rostering platform also clearly alerts you to staff unavailability and highlights when necessary certificates and qualifications are set to expire.
cons: Payroll configuration has been an issue lately but prior to this it was easy and efficient to use.

description: Not applicable
author: Dyllis W.
pros: The most I like above Tanda that it is very easy to roster staff, reschedule due to unavailabilty and the time clocking which helps to track staff attendance , which reflects not on their pay cheque but also on performance management
cons: At times we do have issues with the clocking system as well as the roster shows it is published but on the staff app it shows that the staff is not rostered. This has caused some issues trying to find some one at the last moment

description: Tanda is extremely difficult to work with, I requested a 5-minute phone conversation for a couple of issues that when I first signed up I would be able to solve. I don't work consistent hours as I'm currently looking after my children. But Tanda refused to speak to me, and instead told me to send screenshots because they do not call people (Except my accountant, who has had no problem having phone conversations) They could've taken the call and been done with it but instead, choose to make it as difficult as possible for me.
author: Richelle B.
pros: They have great features and originally were good at the beginning.
cons: The limited contact, overall rudeness, and lacking accountability with the staff.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: TANDA has tons of great features and support is fantastic. Several of the features I'd requested were implemented quickly which shows the effort going into continual improvement
cons: the reporting is limited to what comes in the box. It would be good to be able to export our data to use in a BI tool like Tableau

description: This is efficient, innovative, time saving software. Keeps staff on time and accountable. Very user friendly. The team at TANDA are very responsive, helpful and always listen to the customer. I have been very impressed with it and the company who own and run it. I have recommended it over and over and no-one I know has been disappointed.
author: Frances S.
pros: Tanda makes managing staff very simple, excellent graphs to indicate rostering, easy to enter leave, directly imports into MYOB for payroll. Constantly being updated by the enthusiastic staff to keep up to date with requirements in the workforce.
cons: No cons really, would like a better way to indicate when staff take leave and they have no entitlements.

review_title: Makes more easy on Office work, can save time.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easily can catch up anytime anywhere. While out of work we can able to find out the roster, meanwhile time we are able to access inside can be changes in advance.
cons: Mostly like about update Roster & Working Pattern with budgeting. While operating in work, makes show the history of last week and can be forecasts of upcoming weeks and be on safe side not to be take some decisions on the spots.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We have saved a lot of time and money and now work with a much higher level of accuracy in payroll.
author: Carley O.
pros: This software is easy to use reliable and does everything you need.
cons: There really isn’t much but I wish it was easier to integrate multi sites

review_title: Sales promise the world and delivery does not match - do not expect help with set-up and support
description: Sales tell you one thing and the reality was different. No training, no checklists for set-up, hard to get support, they send you down rabbit holes and don't really trouble shoot.
author: Faith A.
pros: When working it allows staff to log-on and off.
cons: Training and support, particularly around set-up. Tanda staff were just not available and once the product was sold were not interested. After 6 months the integration with Xero is still not working. I use Tanda elsewhere and have integrated with Xero, so I know it works. We think there is something wrong with the set-up, but cannot get any help. Tanda are hard to reach and their trouble shooting guides are inaccurate and describe functionality/options that don't exist.

author: Stephen H.
pros: Tanda is intuitive to use and is front and center in the management of our business. Any time we have questions they are handled promptly and fully. I cannot recommend Tanda highly enough,
cons: I can think of nothing which is lacking.

review_title: Tanda provides a level of assurance
description: Tanda provides a great platform to be able to streamline rostering, payroll and employee onboarding. This ensures we minimise payroll errors, it provides visibility for employees and ensures we are compliant with employment laws around Award Interpretation.
author: Leila S.
pros: Tanda provides peace of mind that employees are being paid correctly through Award Interpretation. The new on-boarding functionality streamlines the paperwork around employee new staff saving valuable time.
cons: There is room for improvement in the area of different levels of access to line managers to not be able to see rates above them and only below.

review_title: Tanda is user friendly for both management and staff
description: Tanda has streamlined the process of rostering staff from different departments. It also ensures that all team member receive their roster promptly both via SMS and email.
author: simone E.
pros: Tanda allows me to budget and tweak roster to ensure that I maximize the staff while minimizing wages. Staff can place their Uni timetable or N/A into Tanda well in advance which has reduced swapping of shifts or no shows of staff. It is great that it is continually evolving and improving.
cons: That I cannot see multiple future staff NA for same day until I am making that roster

description: I am solving the issue of staff arriving late for their shift with Tanda - what gets clocked is what gets paid so there is a big i captive for them to be on time.
author: Fiona P.
pros: I love that my staff can enter leave requests direct into tanda which once approve show up on my roster each week. My staff love that they get a text each week and can easily see their rostered shifts
cons: I have not found any cons with this software

description: Tanda has been very responsive. Customer service has been top notch. Really easy to get ahold of someone when needed. Product works great. If there is something you don't like there is a good chance they will change it. They listen to their customers.
author: Jacob M.
pros: Picture integration, employee access to request days off. Can't beat the price.
cons: Pay periods. The currently only have e a bi-weekly and monthly set ups. If you pay semimonthly like myself you had to do some workarounds to generate reports to an Excel sheet rather than to the interface. Made it to where I couldn't use a lot if the fuclnctions of the software. Hopefully they fix this soon.

description: -Timesheet accuracy -Face recognition -Detailed staff profiles -Easy roster planning
author: Kayleigh D.
pros: The software is fast, the input is accurate and easy to use, like face recognition and time accuracy.....
cons: Not enough functions yet (I know they are always developing) Need to add in a way for the business to contact all staff and for staff to confirm/reject their weekly rosters by accepting them when they are sent to their devices. Need more ways to add comments in to rosters/staff profiles so they stay with that staff member until the account is deactivated

description: I love it. It needs a little fine tuning, but overall it's great
author: Daniel K.
pros: when I needed help, and it was midnight here, someone from Tanda was available. Very helpful
cons: have issues with multiple clocking in and out on the same day. My employees work in different houses during the day, and it can become a bit of a mess with the clock ins and outs

author: Akbar F.
pros: Easy to approved timesheets and easy to change the clock in/out
cons: Reports capability need to be improved (Total overtime per employee per week)

review_title: Tanda made a huge difference for my company.
description: Before Tanda all my employees would simply text me their hours and at what job sites. We all know that isn't the most accurate way to keep track of hours. I can already tell I will be saving a lot of money having Tanda's easy time clock app.
author: Brianne C.
pros: The time-clock app makes it easy and accurate for my carpenters to clock in/out right on site with the click of a button. Its very simple to use and even my older employees caught on quickly.
cons: So far nothing, the software has more to offer than I even need. The prices aren't bad either, before deciding on Tanda I researched several other apps and no prices compared.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Great I use in store, I'm not responsible for payroll, it works well to keep track of staff times.
author: Sarah B.
pros: I love how easy it is to apply for leave for staff
cons: I have had no issues with this software

review_title: Good time tracking service with Great Potential
description: Previously we had issues geolocking our employees to logging into their time cards on site, Tanda solves this with its use of the iPads at our workplace that require our employees to log in from those devices. Tanda then seamlessly imports over our time cards to our payroll service so that we can easily track and pay employees without any workarounds.
author: Chris B.
pros: Customer Service and ease of use, was easy to get set up and at a very affordable price.
cons: User interface and menus sometimes felt cluttered and could use a clean up. a More streamlined and focused homepage specifically.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great looking and easy to use time clock!
description: Great product and great customer service!
author: Doug T.
pros: User-friendly and nice looking graphic interface.
cons: I have no complaints, to be truthfully honest.

description: Really happy overall with the software, been quite a time saver
author: Pat E.
pros: Very intuitive and easy to use, custom built award rules, customer support is great
cons: I think there could be some further work done on being able to produce more meaningful and better formatted reports.
